content.en:
The Void Beast is here!"

In the void outside the cavern, a void beast shuttled in.

Dozens of Eight Extremes Realm people looked solemn one by one, this is equivalent to an Eternal Realm Lord, even if they are, they have no way to compete, they can only delay for a while.

First use the Eternal Origin Weapon of the Blockade type to block the Void, then use the formation to block the time for a while, and then use the Defense Eternal Technique to resist these Void Beasts!"

Many of the Eight Extremes Realms began to stall for time in this way.

But soon, dozens of Void Beasts from the outside world had gathered, and it could be seen that the Eight Extremes Realm's actions of cutting down the Void Golden Marrow Tree had completely angered these Void Beasts.

Click!

An Eternal Origin Weapon that was sealing the Void shattered directly, followed by other Eternal Origin Weapons shattering one after another.

And the big arrays didn't last long, and they were quickly shattered one by one.

At this time, the Eight Extremes Realm needed to directly face these Void Beasts.

I saw that the Eight Extremes Realm teamed up to perform the "Two, Three, Three" Defense Eternal Technique, forming layers of light shields, sealing the entrance to death.

And those Void Beasts kept bombarding the entrance, countless rules shattered, and this piece of void was collapsing.

Some of the weaker and weaker Eight Extremes Realm could not support it on the spot, and their bodies began to crumble, so they could only forcibly take some medicine to restore their injuries.

The only Eight Extremes Realm with light pressure is Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Body is a legendary-level Eternal Body, and it has also reached the realm of transcendence, and its life-preserving ability can be called the first place in the Eight Extremes Realm, even if one person faces multiple Void Beasts, it is enough to save his life.

Therefore, he did not panic at all.

Gu Crane Yuanzu, hurry up, we can't hold it anymore!"

The True Yang Saint Ancestor and the other Eight Extremes Realm sent a message to Gu He Yuanzu and the other five Eight Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realms, urging them to hurry up.

Finally, when the Eight Extremes Realm was about to be completely unable to support it, a click resounded throughout the lair.

The Void Golden Marrow Tree is broken!

Harvest!"

With a wave of his hand, Gu Heyuanzu directly took away the Void Golden Marrow Tree, and immediately sent a message to many Eight Extremes Realm: "The Void Golden Marrow Tree has arrived, and after breaking out of the encirclement, divide the Void Golden Marrow Tree piece by piece." "

it!"

The other Eight Extremes also agreed.

After all, they were still surrounded by Void Beasts, and they didn't have that much time to continue cutting through Void Essence Wood.

So, they must now break out of the encirclement as soon as possible.

It is true that the Eight Extremes Realm can't defeat this group of Void Beasts, but if they want to break out of the encirclement, they can still do it.

After paying a certain price, dozens of Eight Extremes Realm finally broke out of the encirclement.

Immediately, they hid on a small island, set up a concealment formation, and were temporarily safe.

Gu Crane Ancestor, divide the Void Golden Pulp Tree into pieces of Void Golden Pulp Wood. "

An Eight Extremes Realm hurriedly urged.

They are also afraid that Gu Heyuanzu will play tricks, what if they escape?

it!"

Gu He Yuanzu didn't have the intention of repenting, took out the entire Void Golden Marrow Tree, and immediately began to cut it, and it took some time to finally cut it into pieces. Let's start assigning!"

According to the agreement, he directly took one-tenth, and the rest was distributed equally, after all, each of them contributed, and at this time, it was not possible to deal with the question of who was strong, so there would be no way to distribute.

Soon, Ye Tian also obtained a piece of Void Golden Marrow Wood, which was also relatively large in size.

This amount of Void Golden Pulp Wood is enough to refine a lot of Void Golden Pulp Liquid, although it can help to help fuse the Innate Eternal Rules, but it only has a chance of increasing by 5% at most.

But if you collect enough similar treasures, it will be very useful.

For example, Gu He Yuanzu had lived for nearly 10 million eternal years, so Ye Tian didn't believe that he didn't have other treasure resources that could help break through?

After the distribution, Gu He Yuanzu spoke: "Everyone, I only know that the Abyss Land has the resource of the Void Golden Marrow Wood, and now that we have all obtained it, it is not much use to continue to seek the Void Golden Marrow Wood, so I propose that everyone look for treasures separately, lest they only get one kind of treasure, but there is no way to distribute it, resulting in conflicts between each other, what do you think?"

Yes!"

The True Yang Saint Ancestor was the first to agree.

I agree!"

Ye Tian said.

How many good things can he get with a large army? Even if he encounters a good treasure, he can't occupy it alone.

And.

He can also copy his clone, and the two bodies act separately, and if he follows the other Eight Extremes Realm, it is inconvenient for him to copy his own body.

So, he is the one who most wants to act separately.

Agree!"

Agree!"

Most of the Eight Extremes agreed.

And some of the Eight Extremes Realm were not confident in their own strength, and they were injured, so they were ready to act in teams.

And just like that, the team is separated here.

------------，------------，

Ye Tian traveled far away, and the copying talent did not perceive the existence of the other Eight Extremes Realm and the Eternal Realm, so he began to copy his body.

Soon, a copy of the body was created.

Instantly, two bodies shuttled away from both directions.

In this way, his hope of finding the treasure is much greater....

Along the way, no matter what kind of resources they were, as long as they were of some use, he directly collected them.

In any case, the accumulation of resources also has a certain value.

Occasionally, he encounters a Void Beast, and instead of fighting to the death, he chooses to get rid of the Void Beast.

And just like that, the years passed slowly.

Deep in the Abyss.

The True Yang Saint Ancestor came here and found a vein.

It turned out to be an indestructible earth spirit stone vein, this kind of ore vein is integrated into the space-time territory, which helps the space-time territory grow!"

The Abyss said excitedly.

The value of this vein is worth half of his worth.

Just as he was about to take the vein, a large, black, hairy hand grabbed from the void.

The True Yang Holy Ancestor's expression changed drastically, and he used an eternal technique to protect himself.

However, the power of this big hand was too terrifying, and with just one blow, it tore apart his Eternal Technique defense, and the Eternal Origin Armor he wore was also pierced, and the Eternal Body was shattered.

The True Yang Saint Ancestor was covered with countless cracks, as if it was about to completely disperse in the next moment.

He kept moving and recovered from his injuries as quickly as possible.

However, everything is useless.

Boom!

He was shocked directly out of the time shuttle, and then a humanoid void beast appeared, and slammed into him with a punch.

Zhen Yang World Destroying Fist!"

The True Yang Saint Ancestor gathered the strength of his whole body, mobilized all the innate eternal rules, and unleashed a pinnacle punch.

Fist to fist collision!

The other party was not injured, and the True Yang Holy Ancestor was directly blown up by a punch, leaving only a little will, but soon the will was also directly wiped by the other party 3.7. ，

Shaoyang Territory.

In a void, the True Yang Holy Ancestor's body opened his eyes, and his eyes were full of regret.

I should have left, but now I have lost a lot, the Void Golden Marrow has been lost, and my own doppelganger has also fallen, it will take a long time for me to condense this doppelganger again, and I will have to pay very precious resources!"

True Yang Saint Ancestor sighed.

However, I'm glad it's a clone, if it's the body, he's completely fallen this time.

The other Eight Extremes Realm is estimated to be miserable, and there is still a Void Beast of the Immortal Realm hidden in the Abyss Land, and it still has some wisdom!" muttered the True Yang Saint Ancestor.

Immediately, he summoned the Eight Extremes Realm to those who had the ability of clones.

As for whether their doppelgangers are willing to evacuate, that's up to him.

In short, he did his business.

Soon, the other Eight Extremes in the Abyssal Land knew that the Abyssal Land contained a Void Beast comparable to the Lord of the Immortal Realm. _
